# Audio Effects

> Audio bus effects and signal processing

**Category:** Integration · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** integration · godot

## What this does

Audio bus effects and signal processing

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Bus System** — when Route audio through effect chains is requested, then Route audio through effect chains completed.
- **Reverb** — when Space simulation effect is requested, then Space simulation effect completed.
- **Filters** — when EQ and frequency filtering is requested, then EQ and frequency filtering completed.
- **Compressor** — when Dynamic range compression is requested, then Dynamic range compression completed.
- **Distortion** — when Harmonic distortion is requested, then Harmonic distortion completed.
